message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on list conversion and netpoller operations

Fixed silent data loss in list conversion and network polling:

list_conversion.zig:
- String character list conversion now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping characters
- Tuple/array to list conversion now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping items
- All PyValue list append operations now panic on OOM

netpoller.zig:
- Ready thread tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping threads
- Silently dropping threads would cause async operations to hang forever

All changed from 'catch {}' to 'catch unreachable'.
